title: mentha diemenica var. serpyllifolia
intro: Mentha diemenica var. serpyllifolia, also known as Lemon Bee Balm, is a variety of the Mentha diemenica plant, a species of mint native to Australia and New Zealand. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lemon Bee Balm include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, such as colds and flu. Lemon Bee Balm is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to extract its medicinal compounds.
